About Me

Professional Background

Experience & Expertise

With 15 years of experience in the software testing industry, I specialize in leading test operations across various platforms and technologies. Currently working at Meta, I bring deep expertise in SDET practices, test automation, and quality assurance leadership.

My educational background includes studies at The University of Texas at Dallas, where I developed a strong foundation in technical skills that I've built upon throughout my career.

I'm passionate about building robust test infrastructure, implementing comprehensive automation frameworks, and leading high-performing QA teams to deliver exceptional software quality.

Current Role

Meta

Experienced SDET | Test Operations Leader

Leading test operations and automation initiatives for large-scale platforms, driving quality excellence through innovative testing strategies and team leadership.

Services

Professional Services

Comprehensive testing and quality assurance solutions

Test Automation Strategy

Design and implement comprehensive test automation frameworks for large-scale platforms

QA Operations Leadership

Lead and manage QA teams, build efficient test operations, and establish best practices

SDET Expertise

Develop robust test infrastructure, tools, and automation solutions for complex systems

Performance Testing

Analyze and optimize system performance through comprehensive testing and monitoring

Test Infrastructure

Build scalable and reliable test infrastructure for continuous integration and delivery

Technical Consulting

Advise on QA strategies, automation best practices, and test operations optimization
